title: StylerX
tagline: Make OBS Studio look how you want — theme it in real time.
description: Make OBS Studio look how you want — theme it in real time.
longDescription: OBS Studio plugin that lets you change the whole look of it while it's running. Every color, panel, button — tweak it all instantly. Comes with a live color picker, raw CSS editor, widget inspector, theme save/export, and a Python CLI. Written in C++17 with Qt6.
